title: Great Fortune in the New Year!

text_block_list.name: Karuta Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Both teams have fought their way through three rounds before
meeting in this nail-biter. Which will come out on top?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Urara, guard!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: (I want to win... I want us to keep going as far as we can!)

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You got it! There's no getting past me!

text_block_list.name: Karuta Commentator
text_block_list.text:
We're in the first match of the semifinals. Will Team Great Fortune in
the New Year advance to the finals in their first appearance?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um, umm, Opera O! L-left, two-two!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It shall be mine. Hahhh!

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Wow... This team is the real deal! They might actually win it all!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: That's it, everybody! Keep it up! We can win. We will win!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Fuku, raising her voice? You must be super fired up!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Well, it's a big room! I'll shout till I'm hoarse if I need to!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... You know, they're kind of adorable. You can tell they're
trying so hard, it makes you want to cheer for them.

text_block_list.name: Karuta Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And that's it! Advancing to the finals will be Team Great Fortune in
the New Year!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: GyeaAHHHH! W-we did it guys!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? Wait, what?!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Okay, that match was crazy. Now I kind of want to watch them race too!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Same! But... one of them seemed a little off earlier, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Dude, did you hear? Apparently the rosters might change for this
afternoon's final.

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Wait, why? Was there trouble?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ngh... You guys... I'm so sor—cough, cough!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa, Fuku! You shouldn't be talking!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: You don't need to apologize... You were giving out orders and cheering us on. That must've been hard on your voice...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
We don't have anyone who can swap in for you, so... It's sad, but I
guess we just have to forfeit the finals...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ooh... It's all my fault isn't it...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I got so excited about winning I let myself go and... Ugh, we were
doing so well together too...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
D-don't blame yourself like that... O-oh, hey, remember what you told
us?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Having fun is what matters most. We accomplished that just by
participating. Isn't that enough?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Just... just partici...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Just participating is enough? Cough, cough! I know I said that—I believed it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which means, if we all enter the karuta tournament together, then win
or lose, good fortune will be ours!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
As long as we all take part and have fun, everyone goes home happy!
That's what she wanted to get across, if you ask me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But... wouldn't winning make you happy?! Making fun a priority isn't
the same thing as not trying at all.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's because we tried that we had so much fun! But just when I finally
started to understand that, I...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wahhh, I'm such a nincompoop! I just wish you guys could compete in
the finals, even if it was without me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: If only... we had someone, anyone, who could sub in for me...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now seems a good time as any.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My friends, what if I were to tell you there is indeed a way out of this
predicament?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As Fukukitaru just said, we are in need of a messenger from Victory
herself, nothing less than a savior!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Come on out now—your moment has arrived! You are here, aren't you, Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Still haven't learned your indoor voice, I see.
